title: Speedy
writer: John Grey, Lex Neal, Howard Emmett Rogers
actors: Harold Lloyd, Ann Christy, Bert Woodruff
plot: Harold "Speedy" Swift, a fan of Babe Ruth and the New York Yankees, saves from extinction the city's last horse-drawn trolley, operated by his girlfriend's grandfather.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
